author: lOrm
content: Fixed via registry-driven extract_target: each ToolHandler now declares its own PermissionTarget (canonical + arg_key). PermissionManager looks up the handler in the global registry instead of pattern-matching on a hardcoded list. New mutating tools that omit permission_target trip the registry_782_every_handler_makes_explicit_permission_decision test rather than silently fail-opening. Closed the latent notebook_edit hole as part of the fix (it now declares (Edit, notebook_path)). 8 new tests in src/permissions.rs covering: bash/write/edit/notebook handler targets, unknown tool fallback, read-only handler fallback, malformed args denial, and explicit-decision enumeration. 1503 tests pass, cargo clippy exits 0.
